{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220718053C71A24C22D1D781F30B"}"},"total":277},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510775195122778904","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从苏云到萧彰再到林宁，作者大大，超喜欢[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748744305,"group_id":"7501351674561170457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只是一个普普通通的孩子","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+U3UqG7qk3+pdueutkNHate0OB2i/CrEfVQOXK/dwmH","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07a5292cebfa4e0d81fffc2f85d06605~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706368&x-signature=QBoNh8LWvl6MP47n9ElOkiHHoL8%3D","user_id":"2630447261030272","user_name":"秦奉橙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2630447261030272","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501351674561170457","book_info":{"abstract":"林宁意外穿进奥特世界，开局绑定奥特卡牌系统，获得时空之力，只要集齐十二张奥特战士的卡牌，就可以返回原来的世界。
　　林宁自信满满，作为一个成熟的奥迷，什么大场面他没见过？集卡只是小意思。
　　直到他发现猎手骑士剑和梦比优斯第一次见面没有剑拔弩张，反而有点含情脉脉；刚变身就拥有永恒核心力量特利迦；首次变身一点都不恐高的大空大地……
　　林宁：……
　　坏了，这场面他还真没见过！
　　林宁觉得自己一定是穿了一个假的奥特世界。
　　很好，这世界终于癫成了他不认识的模样……
